description_long: This is a single-story rectangular house with a flat roof and a modern, minimalist design. The exterior walls are primarily black and white, with large rectangular windows arranged in a regular pattern along the longer side. The interior layout is visible, showing multiple rooms separated by internal walls, with some rooms featuring wooden flooring and visible furniture. The main entryway is a simple white door centered on the shorter black wall, with no porch or decorative elements. The house appears to be constructed from concrete or masonry, with glass windows and wooden interior elements. The overall aesthetic is clean and functional, suitable for an urban residential neighborhood.
description: A modern, single-story rectangular house with a flat roof, black and white exterior, and large rectangular windows. The layout is open and functional, with a simple central entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main white entry door centered on a black wall, with several windows visible on the side walls.
description_view_1: Side view with a white wall and a single door, revealing the internal room divisions and some interior details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a white wall with multiple large rectangular windows, providing a clear view into the interior rooms.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a black wall and no visible entry, showing the internal room layout from a different angle.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple central white door with no porch, steps, or decorative elements
